PETITION TO COMPEL ACCOUNTING BY ATTORNEY-IN-FACT, FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COR SURCHARGE, CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2004 ETHEL HOROWITZ PETITION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST TO COMPEL ACCOUNTING AND TO AWARD ATTORNEY FEES INCURRED IN THE REQUEST TO COMPEL. THE PETITION IS GRANTED IN PART AS TO SURCHARGE OF JOEL HOROWITZ. JOEL HOROWITZ MOTION TO DISMISS THE PETITION AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED

REPLY BRIEF BY COUNSEL FOR DEBRA J. DOLCH TO RESPONSE BRIEF BY DR. HOROWITZ TO BRIEFS RE: PETN. FOR INSTRUCTIONS

PETN FOR INSTRUCTIONS, CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2003 COURT RULED THAT DR. HOROWITZ EXCEEDED HIS AUTHORITY BY EXECUTING AN IRREVOCABLE TRUST WITHOUT INFORMING OR CONSULTING WITH MRS. HOROWITZ AND THEN AFTER THE FACT INDICATING TO MRS. HOROWITZ THAT A TRUST WAS BEING CONSIDERED. HIS MOTIVE TO PROTECT HIS MOTHER DOES NOT VALIDATE HIS ACTION. THE IRREVOCABLE TRUST CREATED BY DR. HOROWITZ WAS NOT A VALID EXERCISE OF HIS AUTHORITY AND IS NOT VALID. ASSETS HELD BY THE TRUST SHOULD BE RETURNED TO MRS. HOROWITZ. MR. METHVEN FEES ASSOCIATED WITH THE SALE OF THE PROPERTY IS ALLOWED. OTHER FEES ARE NOT ALLOWED. MRS. HOROWITZ CALIFORNIA COUNSEL WILL INSURE HER CALIFORNIA DEBTS ARE PAID.
